word: G729 - ἄῤῥαφος - árrhaphos - ar'-hhraf-os - Without seam

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀῤῥαφος

- Transliteration: Arrhaphos

- Phonetic: ar'-hhraf-os

- Definition:

1. not sewed together, without a seam

- Origin: from G1 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of the same as G4476

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G1 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of the same as G4476; unsewed that is of a single piece: - without seam.
